STEP 787 / Paper 119c — Topological uniformity of ATOMIC_CORES_25
  ==================================================================

  PRE-STEP 787 memory claim:
    "23 FUNNEL + 2 EXCEPTIONS (n=247 ISOLATED, n=255 BYPASS)."

  Empirical verification (test/step787-funnel-empirical-check.ts, 2026-04-19)
  shows that claim was based on a different atomic-cores list (odd n ∈ [27, 255]
  with K/bl² > 1.8). The canonical ATOMIC_CORES_25 from STEP 696 (mod 49152
  saturation) does NOT include n=247 or n=255.

  For the canonical ATOMIC_CORES_25, the situation is stronger and more uniform:

    ★
